Created attachment 167630
patch

- Update to 1.2 release
- Disable GSTREAMER support by default while we add gtksink support in multimedia/gstreamer1-plugins-bad
- Update MAINTAINER to my @FreeBSD.org address


Changelog: https://github.com/baedert/corebird/releases/tag/1.2
